executives.name: Bill McDermott
executives.background: Bill McDermott has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since November 2019. From 2010 to 2019, Mr. McDermott served as CEO of SAP SE. He joined SAP in 2002 and held various leadership positions before becoming CEO.

executives.name: Gina Mastantuono
executives.background: Gina Mastantuono has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2020. Prior to joining ServiceNow, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Ingram Micro Inc. from 2016 to 2019.

executives.name: Chirantan "CJ" Desai
executives.background: Chirantan "CJ" Desai has served as our President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2023. He previously served as Chief Product and Engineering Officer from 2016 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Operating Officer (previously Chief Product Officer)

executives.name: Paul Smith
executives.background: Paul Smith has served as our Chief Commercial Officer since January 2023. He joined ServiceNow in 2020 as President, EMEA.

executives.name: Jacqui Canney
executives.background: Jacqui Canney has served as our Chief People Officer since July 2021. Prior to joining ServiceNow, she was the Chief People Officer at WPP plc.

executives.name: Anita Sands
executives.background: Former Group Managing Director and Head of Change Leadership at UBS Financial Services. She joined the board in 2020.

executives.name: Charles Giancarlo
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Pure Storage, Inc. Former Managing Director at Silver Lake Partners and Executive Vice President at Cisco Systems.

executives.name: Frank Slootman
executives.background: Frank Slootman has served as Chairman of our board of directors since 2019. He served as our Chief Executive Officer from 2019 to February 2024. Previously, he was Chairman and CEO of ServiceNow and Data Domain.

executives.name: John Donahoe
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Nike, Inc. Former CEO of ServiceNow.

executives.name: Jonathan Klein
executives.background: Co-founder and former CEO of Getty Images, Inc.

executives.name: Joseph "Joe" Lonsdale
executives.background: Managing Partner at 8VC and co-founder of Palantir Technologies.

executives.name: Michael Scarpelli
executives.background: Michael P. Scarpelli has served as our Chief Financial Officer since August 2019. From 2011 to 2019, Mr. Scarpelli served as Chief Financial Officer of ServiceNow, Inc. From 2009 to 2011, he served as Senior Vice President of Finance and Business Operations of the Backup Recovery Systems Division of EMC Corporation.

executives.name: Susan Bostrom
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Chief Marketing Officer, and Worldwide Government Affairs at Cisco Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Teresa Briggs
executives.background: Former Vice Chair and West Region Managing Partner of Deloitte LLP.
